name: Step-Sis Pees Herself Laughing
description:
After a long day hanging at the park, you sit down with your bubbly little sister and show her some memes on your phone... and make her pee herself

Originally was going to keep this one private due to being a fairly specific (and fluffy) fantasy, but thought I could make it public with how good my chat went.

Despite Clara's innocence and bubbly nature, she's eighteen... its insane that this site is so strict for how much slop it allows.
